title: AMQP 0-9-1 Model, Virtual Hosts, Exchanges, Queues, and Bindings · Type Forensics
summary: An incident engineer receives a plausible but defective AMQP entity and routing graph; preserve message identity and timing, locate the first broken ownership boundary, and retain a deterministic regression case. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in AMQP entity and routing graph and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Trace producers, connections, channels, exchanges, bindings, queues, consumers, deliveries, and acknowledgements without collapsing their roles.
Use virtual hosts as separate topology and permission namespaces while recognizing they are not complete process or resource isolation.
Derive destination sets from exchange type, routing key, binding key, headers, and exchange-to-exchange bindings.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: RabbitMQ and TypeScript Inspect the failure record · Debug Amqp Entity Model
steps.instruction:
debug case — A debug messaging team handles case 5310 in a benefit-notification consumer near its database pool limit. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to derive zero, one, or many queue destinations from exchange and binding evidence; show recovery after the changed failure is removed; then close the channel while one acknowledgement decision is still pending. Browser code models pure messaging decisions only. amqplib, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, external effects, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Trace producers, connections, channels, exchanges, bindings, queues, consumers, deliveries, and acknowledgements without collapsing their roles.

Inspect the Amqp Entity Model trace for this debug case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?

steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for trace producers, connections, channels, exchanges, bindings, queues, consumers, deliveries, and acknowledgements without collapsing their roles. For RabbitMQ and TypeScript Inspect the failure record · Debug Amqp Entity Model, keep Amqp Entity Model connected to executable TypeScript messaging decision evidence.
